mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registrations (patient_id, doctor_id, department_id, schedule_id, visit_type, registered_at, status) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{departmentId}, #{scheduleId}, #{visitType}, #{registeredAt}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE registrations SET patient_id = #{patientId}, doctor_id = #{doctorId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, schedule_id = #{scheduleId}, visit_type = #{visitType}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
